steps.title: Identify what to compare
steps.content: The student must compare fluorite and corundum—this specific pair. This is the decisive requirement.

steps.title: Find the choice that directly compares exactly these two minerals
steps.content:
Choice A directly compares corundum and fluorite, using the scratch principle to establish that corundum is harder.

Choices B and C introduce quartz instead of one of the target minerals, and choice D describes the scale generally rather than comparing the two specific minerals the student needs.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
